title: Rabdosia volkensiana
taxonomy: Rabdosia volkensiana belongs to the family Lamiaceae, which includes plants commonly known as mint, basil, and sage. It is a flowering plant native to East Africa. Further classification of Rabdosia volkensiana includes its order and family within the plant kingdom. The species is often associated with the genus of plants known as Rabdosia and its classification is further supported by taxonomic studies.
